loc.syn: Televisi Republik Indonesia (TVRI) is a national public television network in Indonesia. TVRI has the status of a Public Broadcasting Institution along with Radio Republik Indonesia (RRI), which is stipulated by law.

Kids from different age groups showcase their strength, speed, and agility as they attempt to conquer a series of challenging physical obstacles. Each episode highlights intense matchups, determination, and the inspiring journey of young ninjas striving to advance and claim victory.

Ninjas from different backgrounds attempt to conquer increasingly difficult courses in every round. With determination and strategy, they strive to advance to the final stages and prove themselves as the ultimate ninja.
The program features exciting games from both men’s and women’s teams, highlighting key moments, star player performances, and decisive matches from the regular rounds through the finals.
A compilation of television films that tell stories on various themes, including family dramas, romantic relationships, and domestic life.
MOJI MOVIE is a film program that presents a selection of movies across various genres to entertain viewers during their leisure time.
MOJI MOVIE is a film program that presents a selection of movies across various genres to entertain viewers during their leisure time.
The show features exclusive coverage and insightful discussions on popular competitions such as football, badminton, tennis, and motorsport, presented in a dynamic and informative style.
It delivers fresh reports on national and international events, economics, sports, and lifestyle, presented in an informative and up-to-date format to help viewers start their day well-informed.

MAGIC 5 THE ANIMATION TELLS THE ADVENTURES OF FIVE SPECIAL TEENS—NAURA, RAHSYA, ADARA, GIBRAN, AND IRSHAD—WHICH ARE FOUND AND CARED FOR BY FATHIR. THESE FIVE CHILDREN HAVE UNIQUE AND DIFFERENT SUPERPOWERS. THEY USE THESE POWERS TO SOLVE VARIOUS CASES AND PROBLEMS THAT OCCUR AROUND THEM. IN ADDITION TO RESCUE MISSIONS, THEY ALSO HAVE TO FACE DAILY CONFLICTS AT SCHOOL, ESPECIALLY FROM THEIR ENEMY GANG, THE BEAST. THIS ANIMATION FOCUS ON THE STORY OF FRIENDSHIP, COHESION, AND THE USE OF SUPERPOWERS FOR GOOD.

THE POKÉMON XYZ ANIMATED SERIES IS PART OF THE POKÉMON FRANCHISE AND FOLLOWS THE ADVENTURES OF ASH KETCHUM, PIKACHU, AND THEIR FRIENDS IN THE KALOS REGION. IN THE SERIES, ASH AIMED TO ACHIEVE VICTORY IN THE KALOS LEAGUE WHILE EXPLORING DIFFERENT CITIES AND MEETING MANY NEW FRIENDS. AS THEIR ADVENTURES CONTINUE, THEY FACE CHALLENGES, ENGAGE IN EPIC BATTLES, AND ENCOUNTER LEGENDARY POKÉMON. THE STORY ALSO HIGHLIGHTS THE STRONG FRIENDSHIP BETWEEN ASH AND HIS FRIENDS, AS WELL AS THEIR POKÉMON CHARACTER DEVELOPMENT.
THE SOMAT FAMILY TELLS THAT WE MUST LIVE SIDE BY SIDE AND HELP EACH OTHER AS A COMMUNITY AND AS STUDENTS.
BEDU AND ADUL IS A 3D ANIMATED FILM SERIAL ABOUT THE ADVENTURES OF CHILDREN IN THE MULTICULTURAL SUBURBS OF JAKARTA. THEIR INQUIRIES MAKE THEM WANTED TO EXPLORE, SOMETIMES CAUSING A FUCKING FUCK.

The Madun series tells the story of Madun (16 years old) and his journey to achieve his dream of becoming a soccer player. His father, Syafei (50 years old), who is of Medan descent, really wants his son to become an Islamic teacher. Because of this, Syafei always hinders Madun's efforts to achieve his dream. For him, Madun only has one choice, which is to become a religious scholar. Madun's mother, Kirana, a native of Batavia, is torn. She must obey her husband, who is anti-soccer. However, on the other hand, she also does not want to prevent Madun from realizing his dreams. She cannot bear to restrain Madun, who loves soccer. However, to realize his dream, Madun faces a lot of competition.

Oddbods is an animated, slapstick comedy that embraces adventure and celebrates friendship. Following the wacky adventures of eight unique and furry friends, who laugh, play and get up to mischief in their hometown of Oddsville, where even the most ordinary of situations have unexpected outcomes.
Little Angel is an animated musical show for pre-schoolers. The show has been captivating families around the world with its cheeky humor and catchy upbeat songs.

With Indonesian-language 3D animations and songs, Cocomelon creates a world centered around the everyday experiences of young children. In addition to helping preschoolers learn letters, numbers, animal sounds, colors, and more, the videos provide lessons in social skills. They give parents the opportunity to teach and play with their children as they watch together.
Watch music videos for Pororo, Tayo, and their friends!

Numberblocks is an educational animated series for preschoolers that teaches mathematical concepts through lively, adventurous number block characters. Each number block has its own numerical value and unique personality. They join forces and interact with each other to solve mathematical problems while teaching basic mathematical concepts such as addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, and other concepts. Each episode of “Numberblocks” typically features a short story in which the number blocks work together to complete a task or face a mathematical challenge. Through songs, engaging stories, and bright visuals, the series aims to introduce and reinforce children's understanding of numbers and basic mathematical concepts in a fun and interactive way.
Firzha and Thoriq struggle with family pressure amid tragedy. Zahra, bound not by blood, reveals the true meaning of loyalty, responsibility, and overlooked sacrifice.

Oki, a perpetual student living on the outskirts of Jakarta. Amidst the pressure to graduate, he falls in love with Azizah. Jahal appears, claiming to be a guardian, and takes advantage of the residents' innocence by opening a medical practice.

The Mongols, led by Genghis Khan, went west to destroy the Jin Dynasty, wanted to go south to destroy the Song Dynasty. Martial Arts Masters from several Schools in the Central Plains of China fought gathering strength to defend Xiangyang.
The Jatarnas broadcast program focuses on crime coverage in a light-hearted manner.
In the 86 program, viewers will be invited to see the daily lives of several police officers.
A light chat program or talk show that will discuss interesting things that still often raise questions in society, whether this is true or just a myth.
Let's watch their jokes only in Persatuan Lucu Indonesia.

Tawa Tawa Santai is a light entertainment program with a comedy nuance that contains comments and parodies of videos that are currently viral. The show's voice actor is usually called "Paijo" on the show.
Keajaiban Dunia is a program that presents a variety of compilations of funny and interesting stories.
This program discusses information from within and outside the country in a light and entertaining manner. It is presented sequentially, according to an interesting and informative theme.
Curahan Hati presents emotional real-life stories from different walks of life, sharing personal confessions, inner conflicts, and journeys toward understanding and resolution.
What's happening in the world today? All the events and tragedies currently happening around the world will be summarized clearly and up-to-date. Only on Net TV!
